assessor_1_raw: E-commerce ranker experiment: methodologically sound. IPW for position bias is appropriate and symmetric. Temporal split with frequency stratification is correct. Human annotation sanity check adds calibration value. Bootstrap CIs stratified by frequency decile are comprehensive. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Strong design. BPE tokenizer fit on training data only is correct fit-apply separation. LambdaMART with equivalent tuning is a fair baseline. NDCG@10 is the right metric for position-sensitive ranking. Frequency decile NDCG detects non-uniform improvement. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: Well-designed search ranking experiment. The scope is appropriately bounded to offline ranking quality. The human annotation sample for sanity checking is a good quality control. IPW position bias correction is the standard approach. No methodological flaws. Verdict: defense_wins.
adjudication_raw: Unanimous defense_wins from all three assessors.
